title: Presentation mode - multiple Dashboards with Loop/Play function
excerpt:
Currently presentation mode is just Fullscreen mode for just 1 dashboard. 


MUST: be able to show multiple (selected) dashboards in one presentation. Now you have to exit presentation mode, click the next dashboard, and…

posts.author: MauritsNWC (MauritsNWC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently presentation mode is just Fullscreen mode for just 1 dashboard.

  1. MUST: be able to show multiple (selected) dashboards in one presentation. Now you have to exit presentation mode, click the next dashboard, and enter presentation mode again.

  2. WISH: I would like to loop selected Dashboards in presentation mode, with a timer for each slide. So we can show real time stats on big screens in the office.

posts.author: Paul_Adams (Paul Adams)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes i would also like to be able to show multiple dashboard “slides” and main metrics on a main screen in the office. Is there another way to achieve this?
